name: @prune/wastebench
description: F19 — WasteBench + Signed Attestations. Counterfactual savings accounting that nets out the observer's OWN overhead (net savings can be negative and is reported honestly), a reflexive overhead SLO (the tool must cost less than a bounded fraction of what it saves), and Ed25519-signed, tamper-evident savings manifests over a deterministic canonical serialization (real PKI via node:crypto). Makes savings auditable for enterprise trust. No regex, no model call, no fabricated numbers — all magnitudes are caller-measured.
